archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Elite Athleticism & Precision)
philosophy: Tactical Minimalism. A command-center focus for fitness. No soft shadows, no muddy grays. High-visibility data, sharp edges, and kinetic triggers against a deep obsidian void.

hierarchy.h1_hero: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase
hierarchy.h2_section: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight uppercase

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous inside containers, tight between widgets. p-4 to p-12.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 lg:gap-6

visual_enhancers.radius: rounded-none for sharp tactical feel, maximum rounded-sm for micro-elements
visual_enhancers.shadows: Remove soft dropshadows. Use inner glows: shadow-[inset_0_2px_4px_rgba(255,255,255,0.02)]
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Avoid in fitness apps (too fragile). Use solid flat dark surfaces.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay (opacity-5) on the main background.

components.cards: Flat bg (#141414), 1px subtle border, no shadow. Hover: slight border color lighten to rgba(255,255,255,0.2).
components.buttons: Sharp edges. Primary: bg-[#007AFF] text-white hover:bg-[#3395FF]. Ghost: bg-transparent border border-white/20 hover:bg-white/5.
components.checklist_item: Row with hover state. Checkbox (Shadcn customized to rounded-none). When checked: text-gray-600 line-through transition-all duration-300.
components.calendar_heatmap: Custom grid. Empty/Missed: bg-[#1A1A1A], Completed: bg-[#007AFF]. Rest Day (Sun): bg-[#333333] patterned or striped.
components.streak_tracker: Prominent display. Use large Barlow Condensed numbers (text-5xl to 7xl) in Volt Blue.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Explicit hover colors required. E.g., hover:text-white hover:border-white/30.
motion_and_interactions.focus: High contrast focus rings. focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#007AFF] focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-[#0A0A0A].
motion_and_interactions.list_transitions: Staggered opacity fade-in for list items and grid items.

image_urls.description: Grayscale photo of man doing pull-ups. Use as a low-opacity (5-10%) fixed background graphic or header accent to set a hardcore gym mood without hurting data legibility.
Black textured surface. Use as an overlay mix-blend-screen or opacity-5 over empty state cards to avoid digital flatness.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Strict APCA/WCAG AA compliance. Use Text Shadow over images if text overlaps.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_rule: ALL interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="complete-workout-btn"`, `data-testid="streak-count"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts in HTML/CSS: Barlow Condensed (weights 400, 700, 900) and DM Sans (weights 400, 500, 700).
Install Phosphor icons: `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react` for a sharp, tactical look. If failing, use lucide-react.
Implement the 'Control Room' Bento Grid. Data widgets must have h-full to stretch properly. No jagged bottoms.

For forms and interactions, strictly use Shadcn UI (Checkbox, Dialog, Select) but customize them heavily to remove 'Vercel' softness. Make radii sharp (rounded-none), borders 1px solid, and dark theme colors.
Calendar Heatmap: Do not use heavy date libraries if not needed. A simple CSS Grid for the 52-week heatmap (similar to GitHub) is highly preferred, using the defined accent colors.
